UnsupportedEncodingException.reasoning: In Python, the UnicodeError type is used to represent an error that occurs when a specific operation or function requires a particular encoding but it's not available. This can occur in various scenarios such as trying to encode or decode text using an unsupported character set. In this case, we are dealing with the situation where the specified encoding (in this case, "Q" for quoted-printable) is not supported by Python.
